mapper.sql: po.id, po.tenant_id, po.order_no, po.title, po.supplier_name, po.amount_cent, po.purchase_items, po.need_date, po.status, po.applicant_id, po.applicant_name, po.applicant_dept_id, po.applicant_dept_name, po.business_key, po.process_instance_id, po.dept_leader_id, COALESCE(dept_user.real_name, dept_user.username) AS dept_leader_name, po.engineering_manager_id, COALESCE(engineering_user.real_name, engineering_user.username) AS engineering_manager_name, po.countersign_user_ids, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(cu.real_name, cu.username) ORDER BY cu.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM sys_user cu WHERE FIND_IN_SET(cu.id, po.countersign_user_ids) ) AS countersign_user_names, po.cc_role_keys, po.arrival_list_file_ids, po.applicant_modify_remark, po.dept_leader_remark, po.engineering_manager_remark, po.countersign_remark, po.reject_reason, po.remark, po.create_by, po.create_time, po.create_dept, po.update_by, po.update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sample_purchase_order po LEFT JOIN sys_user dept_user ON dept_user.id = po.dept_leader_id LEFT JOIN sys_user engineering_user ON engineering_user.id = po.engineering_manager_id WHERE po.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND po.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND po.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%')
AND po.supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.supplierName}, '%')
AND po.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY po.update_time DESC, po.id DESC

SELECT
FROM sample_purchase_order po LEFT JOIN sys_user dept_user ON dept_user.id = po.dept_leader_id LEFT JOIN sys_user engineering_user ON engineering_user.id = po.engineering_manager_id WHERE po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND po.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, tenant_id, order_no, title, supplier_name, amount_cent, purchase_items, need_date, status, applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_dept_id, applicant_dept_name, business_key, process_instance_id, dept_leader_id, engineering_manager_id, countersign_user_ids, cc_role_keys, arrival_list_file_ids, applicant_modify_remark, dept_leader_remark, engineering_manager_remark, countersign_remark, reject_reason, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time FROM sample_purchase_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND business_key = #{businessKey} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
